category_sources: source_facts.description identifies gulp-cli as the command-line utility for Gulp; official GitHub README says it is the Command Line Utility for Gulp.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gulp-cli; official GitHub repository heading is gulpjs/gulp-cli.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains install, usage, configuration, completion, and flags documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official gulpjs/gulp-cli GitHub repository; source_facts.repo is empty so repo was enriched.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify it as the Gulp CLI; official GitHub topics include javascript, gulp, cli, and command-line.
